name: Fumi Manjoume
description: A tall, dark haired, bespectacled girl. She is seen by other girls as being strong, refined and genteel, however they become surprised when they realise that Fumi is actually very gentle and shy. Others have noted her for having pretty eyes and a soft, lady-like voice. She is often said to make "scary faces" when she is upset or irked. name: Fushigidane
description: Fushigidane is a small, quadruped Pokémon that has blue-green skin with darker patches. It has red eyes with white pupils, pointed, ear-like structures on top of its head, and a short, blunt snout with a wide mouth. A pair of small, pointed teeth are visible in the upper jaw when its mouth is open. Each of its thick legs ends with three sharp claws. name: Ginji Amano

He received the title "Raitei" (literally, "Lightning Emperor") because of his ability to control electricity. This control grants him several unique abilities such as amazing regenerative power as well as the ability to become a human magnet and battery. name: Ginshu

name: Goushi Asougi
description: A male player who is Pitohui's acquaintance and longtime friend. Asougi Goushi, known as M in Gun Gale Online, is one of the main characters of the Sword Art Online Alternative "Gun Gale Online" spin-off series. He is a giant man, over 190 centimeters tall, and is good at medium to long-range combat, and is especially good at sniping. He is calm, has excellent strategy planning skills, and serves as the team's staff officer.

name: Gretel
description: Hänsel and Gretel are two unnamed Romanian identical twin orphans, suggested to be male and female, who were abandoned in a state-run orphanage due to the Nicolae Ceauşescu regime's ban on abortion. As a result of being repeatedly forced to participate in paedophilic snuff films in which they are either raped or forced to murder other children, the twins eventually became deranged, sadistic killers just to survive. name: Hozumi Kohinata
description: Looks cute, but actually loves terrible jokes and wants to work in the theater. Even if he's injured, he always carries a smile. The caring eldest son of a big family.

name: Jina
description: Her indifferent-seeming demeanor gives an impression of coldness, but she’s actually a very warm-hearted woman. Constantly searching internally for answers as to what exactly she needs to do, and the meaning of her very existence.

name: Ken Masters
description: Ryu's best friend and the only son of the extremely rich Masters family. He lives in San Francisco with his parents in a very large mansion (it takes 20 minutes to drive from the front yard to the main house). He too spends a lot of time training as well, but not as much as Ryu. Ken also rides a motorcycle. His mother is Japanese. name: Kotobuki Awano
description: She was born into a corporation called Japan Plati as Neiru. Her genetic makeup is identified as extremely rare, presenting the characteristics of heterochromia, albinism and high intelligence at the same time. Kotobuki Awano became both a scientist and a doctor and took the post attributed to Doctor Seki unintentionally. Neiru it's her only friend in the entire corporation.
